allow: Bash(node -e "const r = require\('@remotion/renderer'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(r\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('preset'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('x264'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('encode'\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const r = require\('@remotion/renderer'\); const rm = r.renderMedia.toString\(\).slice\(0,200\); console.log\(rm\)")
Bash(node -e "const r = require\('@remotion/renderer'\); const src = r.renderMedia.toString\(\); const idx = src.indexOf\('chromiumOptions'\); console.log\(src.slice\(idx, idx+500\)\)")
